summary: Comprehensive testing of Bug Fix: Full Script Mode file upload support (PDF/image) and Voice Selection for Scene Reader. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend Playwright tests passed - Full Script upload zone + textarea with 'OR PASTE' divider, clarification toggles in Paste sides flow, and Voice Selection with 10 curated voices in Scene Reader.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/extract-text with text-based PDF returns extracted text and character count
Backend: POST /api/extract-text with image file returns OCR'd text
Backend: POST /api/extract-text with empty file returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/extract-text with unsupported file type returns 400 error
Backend: GET /api/tts/voices returns exactly 10 voices
Backend: GET /api/tts/voices - all voices have full metadata (voice_id, name, gender, accent, style)
Backend: GET /api/tts/voices includes expected names (Rachel, Adam, Sarah, Daniel, Charlie)
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text (Quick mode) regression test passed
Backend: POST /api/parse-scenes (Full Script paste-only) regression test passed
Frontend: Full Script Step 2 shows both 'Upload PDF or image' zone and paste textarea
Frontend: 'OR PASTE' divider visible between upload zone and textarea
Frontend: File input element exists for Full Script upload
Frontend: Continue button appears after pasting script in Full Script mode
Frontend: Character name input and Find My Scenes button work in Step 3
Frontend: Scene selection (Step 4) shows scenes with 'YOUR SCENE' tags
Frontend: Clarification toggles appear in Paste sides Step 3 after clicking 'Add context'
Frontend: Clarification toggles (cold_read, comedic, dramatic, self_tape) can be selected/deselected
Frontend: Multiple clarification toggles can be selected simultaneously
Frontend: Scene Reader opens with Voice Active badge when TTS available
Frontend: Voice picker toggle shows 'Rachel (default)' initially
Frontend: Voice picker list shows all 10 curated voices with metadata
Frontend: Voice selection works - can select different voice (e.g., Adam)
Regression: 'Upload sides' flow still works with upload zone and file input
Regression: Full Script paste-only flow still works
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 497-593: /api/extract-text endpoint correctly handles PDFs (text extraction + Vision OCR fallback) and images (Vision OCR)
server.py lines 1211-1223: DEFAULT_VOICES array contains 10 curated voices with full metadata
server.py lines 1231-1235: /api/tts/voices returns voices array with available flag
UploadPage.jsx lines 117-162: handleFullScriptFile correctly extracts text from PDF/image via /api/extract-text
UploadPage.jsx lines 456-519: Full Script Step 2 UI shows upload zone + 'OR PASTE' divider + textarea
UploadPage.jsx lines 774-796: Clarification toggles (CLARIFICATION_OPTIONS) render correctly with toggle functionality
SceneReader.jsx lines 340-382: Voice picker UI with 10 voices, shows name/gender/accent/style metadata

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all file upload, clarification toggles, and voice selection features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Created test PDF with fpdf2 using new API (pdf.cell with text=, new_x='LMARGIN', new_y='NEXT'). Created test image with PIL for OCR testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for Full Script Mode file upload fully tested and working. Key test data: Test PDF created with fpdf2 new API, test image created with PIL. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_extract_text_and_voices.py covers extract-text endpoint and TTS voices. Frontend flow: input-type-fullscript > fullscript-upload-zone (clickable) + fullscript-file-input (hidden) + fullscript-textarea > step-next-2-fullscript. Clarification toggles: toggle-context-button > clarification-{id} toggles. Voice picker: voice-picker-toggle > voice-picker-list > voice-option-{voice_id}.
